sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66475" key="meso/platos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσό-πλᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n66475.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">broad in the middle</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agathem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
